executives.name: Jack Hamilton
executives.background: Mr. Hamilton has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior executive roles with major mining companies. He previously served as President and CEO of several exploration and development companies.

executives.name: Bob McKnight
executives.background: Mr. McKnight is a professional engineer with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in project evaluation, financial analysis, and corporate development.

executives.name: David Webb
executives.background: Dr. Webb is a professional geologist with over 30 years of experience in mineral exploration and development. He has been involved in the discovery and development of several mineral deposits in Canada and internationally.

board_of_directors.name: Jack Hamilton
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hamilton has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior executive roles with major mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Joe Ovsenek
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Ovsenek is a professional engineer and lawyer with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. He is currently the President and CEO of P2 Gold Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Ross McDonald
board_of_directors.background: Mr. McDonald is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 40 years of experience in public accounting and financial management.

board_of_directors.name: Michelle Tanguay
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Tanguay has over 25 years of experience in environmental management and regulatory affairs in the mining industry.

sources.source_description: Company Website - Management and Directors Page
